title: Copilot metrics issue
author: OkyDokyman 3
text:
When I use new REST API endpoints for GitHub Copilot usage metrics, it works for ORG usage. When I try for any TEAM like this:
curl -L \
-H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \
-H "Authorization: Bearer <YOUR-TOKEN>" \
-H "X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28" \
https://api.github.com/orgs/ORG/team/TEAM_SLUG/copilot/usage
It is always empty.
What am I missing?
excerpt:
